package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_returns_transport_writer_or_gin_h: Services that return `gin.H`, `http.ResponseWriter`, or response-writing helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule178NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule178NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule178NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario178Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule178NegativeService, input Rule178NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
